---
title: "Week07"
date: "2025-08-08"
#date-modified: "2025-07-29"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/tele.jpg"
categories:
  - "2025"
  - Telecaster
  - Practice
  - TGIAY
  - Song
---

## Picking Practice

-   Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 1 min

-   Alternate picking, fingers 1-3-2-4, from E to e string, 1 min

-   Alternate picking, fingers 4-2-3-1, from E to e string, 1 min

-   Arpegiation

-   Strumming pattern: D, DU, UDU (1 - 2& - &4&)

## Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

[**C**]{.underline} C#Db [**D**]{.underline} D#Eb [**E**]{.underline} [**F**]{.underline} F#Gb [**G**]{.underline} G#Ab [**A**]{.underline} A#Bb [**B**]{.underline}

## Cmaj Scale

```         
C – D – E – F – G – A – B – C
```

-   Play full Cmaj scale up & down in the first position, 1 min

-   Improvise over backing track

## Chord Practice

-   **G** Chord, 2 min

-   **Cadd9** Chord, 2 min

-   **Dsus4** Chord, 2 min

-   **Em** Chord, 2 min

-   Chord progression, **G → G → Cadd9 → Dsus4**, 1 min.

-   Chord progression, **G → G → Cadd9 → Em**, 1 min.

-   Chord progression, **Em → Dsus4 → Cadd9 → G**, 1 min.

-   Chord progression, **Em → G → Em → G**, 1 min.

-   

    ## Song Practice

Good Riddence (Time of Your Life) by Green Day

## Video Log

{{< video https://youtu.be/wpMERngKemQ >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/P9Pc5xMcXJI >}}

## Fender Telecaster

Pickup Position: Neck\
Master Volume: 3\
Master Tone: 5

## Zoom G3Xn

Preset: OFF

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 25%\
Rate: 25%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 3.5\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 4.5\
Bass: 7.0\
Middle: 11.0\
Master: 4.0\
Reverb: 2.0

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 10 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

## Lesson Video

{{< video https://youtu.be/tH_Hh5c_Jo8?si=7iEWY-k8nvMcuRpA >}}

## Backing Track

{{< video https://youtu.be/JwcCBGqPmwU?si=ZNiTJGUl7w_PYu2i >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/fyqSZfOxwlI?si=ovFglWd2qyRF21bZ >}}
